name: extract_phone_transcript_features
description: Extract structured features from initial phone call transcript for early claim assessment

incident_type.description: Type of incident (e.g., 'fall from height', 'struck by equipment', 'repetitive motion', 'lifting injury')

incident_date.description: Date of incident if mentioned (YYYY-MM-DD format)

body_parts_affected.description: List of affected body parts mentioned by claimant (e.g., ['lower back', 'right shoulder'])

injury_type_and_body_part.description: Specific injury and affected body part (e.g., 'lower back strain from lifting', 'right shoulder rotator cuff injury', 'left knee contusion')

initial_pain_level.description: Pain level on 1-10 scale if mentioned by claimant

immediate_functional_limitations.description: Functional restrictions described by claimant (e.g., 'cannot lift, limited walking', 'unable to use right arm', 'difficulty standing')

emergency_care_required.description: Whether emergency room or hospital care was required or mentioned

claimant_age_and_occupation.description: Claimant's age and job type information if mentioned

safety_protocol_compliance.description: Level of safety protocol compliance: full (all protocols followed), partial (some protocols followed), none (no protocols followed), unknown (not discussed)

witness_availability.description: Whether witnesses to the incident are available

hospital_er_treatment.description: Whether hospital or emergency room treatment was mentioned or received

specialist_referral.description: Whether specialist referral was mentioned or recommended

surgery_potential.description: Whether surgery was discussed as a potential treatment

claimant_cooperation_level.description: Level of claimant cooperation during phone call

narrative_consistency.description: Whether claimant's story is internally consistent

immediate_reporting.description: Whether incident was reported promptly (same day or next day)

family_financial_pressure.description: Indicators of family financial pressure that might influence claim behavior

injury_severity_initial.description: Initial injury severity assessment based on claimant's description

liability_indicators.description: Liability indicators mentioned (e.g., ['equipment malfunction', 'no safety training', 'wet floor'])

immediate_medical_attention.description: Whether claimant received immediate medical attention

medical_facility_type.description: Type of medical facility visited initially

work_stoppage.description: Whether claimant stopped working immediately after incident

estimated_time_off_work_days.description: Initial estimate of time off work in days (claimant's expectation)

credibility_assessment.description: Initial credibility assessment based on account consistency and detail level

red_flags.description: Any red flags identified (e.g., ['inconsistent timeline', 'delayed reporting', 'vague details'])

witness_mentioned.description: Whether witnesses to the incident were mentioned

prior_injuries_mentioned.description: Whether claimant mentioned any prior injuries to same body part

narrative_analysis.description: Rich text analysis (400-800 characters) covering: (1) Summary of claimant's account and incident details, (2) Initial risk assessment based on severity indicators and mechanism, (3) Red flags, credibility concerns, or positive indicators identified, (4) Early cost predictors and expected claim trajectory, (5) Recommended next steps for claim handling and investigation

overall_confidence.description: Confidence in extracted information from phone transcript (often lower than formal documents)

data_quality.description: Quality of phone transcript (clarity, completeness, audio quality)

missing_information.description: Critical information not captured in initial phone call
